title: BEM-868 execute 867
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:04 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem867_route_after_bem866.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps.startswith('dispatch_result_parsed_dispatch_attempted'):
    status='dispatch_attempted_verify_runtime_next'
    next_action='verify Claude runtime state and response after dispatch_attempted'
elif ps.startswith('dispatch_result_parsed_token_missing'):
    status='token_missing_patch_required'
    next_action='patch GH_TOKEN secret/env wiring for queue processor'
elif ps.startswith('dispatch_result_parsed_dispatch_failed'):
    status='dispatch_failed_patch_required'
    next_action='patch workflow id/ref/permissions based on dispatch failure'
elif ps=='runtime_outcome_collected':
    status='runtime_outcome_patch_required'
    next_action=prev.get('next_action','patch runtime outcome')
elif ps=='result_writer_probe_waiting_tick':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem868_result_writer_tick_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v20','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-868 result writer probe follow-up','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='result_writer_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify result writer'
else:
    status='unknown_route'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-867 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-868','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem868_execute_bem867_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem868_execute_bem867_route.md').write_text('# BEM-868 | Execute BEM-867 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem868_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-868'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem868_execute_bem867_route.json','governance/reports/bem868_execute_bem867_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem868_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-867 route by selecting dispatch-attempted verification, token/dispatch patch, runtime outcome patch, or result-writer probe')
